semantic.role: Abstraction layer for reading and writing supported configuration values (LLM provider, model, pre-commit, etc.). Provides a type-safe accessor interface and mapping between configuration keys and concrete accessor methods.
responsibilities: Define the ConfigSupportedValueAccess interface with getter and setter methods for each supported configuration key.
Implement getSupportedValue, which delegates to the appropriate accessor method based on the SuppportedConfigKey.
Implement setSupportedValue, which validates the key and delegates to the appropriate setter method.

Centralize type-safe access to configuration values such as LLM provider, model, base URL, pre-commit flag, hook sync mode, artifact strategy, view layer, enabled views, agent instructions file, gitignore/gitattributes management flags.
outOfScope: Configuration file parsing or environment variable reading (handled by other modules).
Persistent storage of configuration values (delegated to the ConfigSupportedValueAccess implementation).
Validation of configuration values beyond key existence (basic error on unknown key).
Handling of arbitrary or unsupported configuration keys.
invariants: All supported configuration keys have a corresponding getter/setter pair in ConfigSupportedValueAccess.
getSupportedValue and setSupportedValue will throw an Error if the key does not match a known supported key.
The interface must be implemented by a concrete facade that provides the actual storage/retrieval mechanism.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a stable, type-safe access pattern for configuration values that are explicitly supported by ArchSpine, insulating callers from the underlying storage mechanism.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent changes detected; this file is consistent with the overall architecture.

publicSurface.description: Interface defining getter and setter methods for each supported configuration key (LLM provider, model, base URL, pre-commit, hook sync mode, artifact strategy, view layer, enabled views, agent instructions, gitignore/gitattributes management).
Reads a supported configuration value by delegating to the appropriate accessor method on a ConfigSupportedValueAccess instance. Throws for unknown keys.
Writes a supported configuration value by delegating to the appropriate setter method on a ConfigSupportedValueAccess instance. Throws for unknown keys.

Implement getSupportedValue, which delegates to the appropriate accessor method based on the SuppportedConfigKey.
Implement setSupportedValue, which validates the key and delegates to the appropriate setter method.

Centralize type-safe access to configuration values such as LLM provider, model, base URL, pre-commit flag, hook sync mode, artifact strategy, view layer, enabled views, agent instructions file, gitignore/gitattributes management flags.
outOfScope: Configuration file parsing or environment variable reading (handled by other modules).
Persistent storage of configuration values (delegated to the ConfigSupportedValueAccess implementation).
Validation of configuration values beyond key existence (basic error on unknown key).
Handling of arbitrary or unsupported configuration keys.

exports.name: setSupportedValue
exports.signature:
setSupportedValue(
  access: ConfigSupportedValueAccess,
  key: SupportedConfigKey,
  value: unknown,
)
